deals.deal: $9.99 Any Large Pizza — Any Crust, Up to 7 Toppings
deals.desc: Order online or in the Domino's app to get any large pizza with up to 7 toppings on any crust (including Parmesan Stuffed Crust) for $9.99.

deals.deal: BOGO Sandwich, Salad or Bowl for $5 — Code BOGO5
deals.desc: Buy one whole sandwich, salad, Market Bowl, Salad Stuffer, or soup at Panera and get a second for just $5 with promo code BOGO5 at checkout.
Save about 40% off regular prices by ordering half-portion soups, sandwiches, and salads from Panera's Mix & Match $4.99 menu — up to 10 items per order.

deals.deal: $6 Big Box — 2-Pc Chicken or 3-Pc Tenders + 2 Sides + Biscuit
deals.desc: Grab the Popeyes $6 Big Box with 2 pieces of Signature Chicken or 3 Tenders, two regular sides, and a biscuit — available in the app.

deals.deal: America's $2.50 Menu — Hot Dog, Jr Double Cheeseburger & Onion Rings
deals.desc: Sonic is celebrating America's 250th birthday with the 6" All-American Dog, Jr. Double Cheeseburger, and Medium Onion Rings each priced at $2.50.

deals.deal: Moana Movie Meal Deal — Upgrade Any Combo for $1, Get Collectible Cup + $15 Fandango Code
deals.desc: Upgrade any Subway combo meal for $1 to receive one of five collectible Moana cups and a $15 Fandango promo code to see the movie in theaters.

deals.deal: 6" Sub of the Day + Chips or Cookie + Drink for $6.99
deals.desc: Every day at Subway, get the featured 6-inch sub of the day bundled with chips or a cookie and a drink for just $6.99.

deals.deal: Cravings Value Menu — 10 Items at $3 or Less
deals.desc: Taco Bell's Cravings Value Menu offers 10 items including burritos, nachos, and more for $3 or less, available every day through the app or in-store.

deals.deal: Luxe Cravings Box — Chalupa Supreme + Burrito + Taco + Chips + Drink for $7
deals.desc: Get a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips and nacho cheese sauce, and a medium fountain drink for $7.
Get a box of KFC Chicken Tenders for $5 when you order online or through the KFC app at participating locations.

deals.deal: Limited-Edition Eagle Cup ($10.99) — Includes Free Medium Beverage
deals.desc: Dunkin' is selling a limited-edition Eagle Cup for $10.99 that comes with a free medium beverage and a code for one $3 medium Zero drink or Refresher per day for 30 days.

deals.deal: Fresca Menu — Lighter Items Under 500 Calories (Drive-Thru Available)
deals.desc: El Pollo Loco's Fresca line of wraps, smaller bowls, and salads clocks in under 500 calories each and is available through the drive-thru or app order at all locations.

deals.deal: Value Duet — Cup of Soup + Half Sandwich for $6.99
deals.desc: Every day at Panera, pair a cup of soup with a half sandwich from select combos (like Greek Salad + Tomato Soup) for just $6.99, no coupon needed.
